Day of Giving · September 23, 2026

All In for Kids.

Kids can't do it alone.

One day. Every dollar tripled. Help us raise $3 million in 24 hours to fund the care, research, and answers Colorado's kids count on.

The match · 24 hours only

Today,
every dollar
becomes three.

$1 × 3 = $3

A coalition of Colorado donors has put up a 3x match for every gift made on September 23. Your $50 becomes $150. Your $500 becomes $1,500. Your impact, tripled — but only for 24 hours.

we go all in.

Every gift gets us closer. Every match dollar pushes us higher. This is what happens when Colorado shows up for its kids.

Meet Meg

Meg doesn't
face her rare
genetic condition alone.

Her village — including people like you — supports her healing.

And on September 23, your support goes three times further.

Meet her village
Chapter 01 / Her village
Her village supports her.

Every step of the way, since the day she was diagnosed.

Chapter 02 / Her parents
Her parents.

Through every hospital stay, every procedure, every milestone — they've never left her side.

Chapter 03 / Her brother
Her brother.

The big brother who learned to fix her adaptive bike just so she could ride next to him.

Chapter 04 / Her care team
Her care team.

The specialists, nurses, and child life experts at Children's Colorado who treat the whole kid — not just the diagnosis.

Chapter 05 / Her family
And people like you.

Whose donations fund the research, equipment, and family-centered care that make Meg's life possible.

Kids can't do it alone.

Be part of the
village.

Today, your gift to Meg's village — and every Colorado kid like her — is tripled. 3x match. 24 hours only.
